titleStmt.title: SII 9.254: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 254. (A.R. No. 445 of 1914.) ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE KOTISVARA TEMPLE AT KOTNAKALLU, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a composite record registering gifts made at different times. The first is dated the 11th year of the Chāḷukya king, Jagadēkamalladēva, Vibhava, Pushya, śu. 13, Śukravāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1148 December 24 Friday, Uttarāyaṇa beginning on the next day. It gives the genealogy of the Chāḷukya kings and refers to Jagadēkamalla's feudatory Vīra-Pāṇḍyadēva and his mother Sōvaladēvī, daughter of Bhillavarāya and sister of Vikramāditya. It also mentions Boppadēva, son of Ajjanaranātha and Mahādēvi, the daughter of Vikramāditya. Vikramāditya is stated to have made a grant of the village Koṭṭiganūru for the service of the god Kōṭiśaṅkaradēva on the northern side of Hūvina-Haḍaṅgile and for the feeding of Brāhmans. The writer of the inscription is stated to have been Madhusūdana, the teacher of the Pāṇḍya chief. The 120 Mahājanas of Hūvina-Haḍaṅgile were placed in charge of the charity.

The same Mahājanas are stated to have made a gift of land for the service of the same god in the 6th year (of Jagadēkamalladēva ?), Rudhirōdgārin, Māgha, śu. 5, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1144 January 11 Tuesday; f.d.t. ·17 (not Monday).

In the cyclic year Virōdhin, Āshāḍha, śu. 8, Sōmavāra probably corresponding to A.D. 1169 June 4 Wednesday, Monday being a mistake, Vikramādityarasa is said to have made a gift of land for the service of the god Śrī-Vīrakēśavadēva.

Again in the year Viḷambi, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 11, Śukravāra probably corresponding to A.D. 1178 July 27 Thursday, Friday being an error, Vijaya-Pāṇḍyadēva is stated to have made a gift of some land for the service of the god Kōṭiśaṅkaradēva, besides a house and a garden.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traylōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . jayaṁta(ti)sthāyisaṁcāribhāvābhinayabhāvakāḥ nī
lalōhitaśailūṣabhrūlatālāsyavibhramāḥ . svasti samastavastuguṇasaṁstutanānatadēvamauḷivinyastapadāṁbujaṁ tribhuvanaprabha
vaṁ bhavanabjajāṁḍadoḷvistṛtavāge māḍida dharitriyanāvarisiḻduparbi rōdhastaḷamaṁ paḷaṁcaleva bhaṁguratuṁgataraṁgasaṁgataṁ . tadvaḷayavaḷayi
taṁ viḷasadamalavicitramenisi sogayisuvudu jaṁbūdvīpamalli kubhridvallabhanenipa mērugiri raṁjisuttire . Aṁteseva
mērugiriyiṁdaṁ teṁkaṇadeseyoḷeseva bhāratavarṣābhyantaradoḷiḷākānteya kuntaḷamene mukhyavāytu kuntaḷadēśa . kuntaḷadēśama
nāḷvaranantāhitamahapanikaramaṁ geldu mahīkāntāvallabharatiśayakāntaguṇāvāsaratibalarccāḷukyaru . cāḷukyatiḷakanāḷdaṁ
śrīlalanāliṁgitōccavakṣasthaḷanābhīḷapratāpana suhṛtkīlālapanenipa tailapaṁ vasumatiya . Ene śauryyōnnatanāda tailapanapa
tyaṁ sattimaṁ taṁnṛpāḷana putraṁ vibhuvikramaṁ tadanujaṁ sandayyaṇaṁ tanmahīśana tammaṁ jayasiṁhanātana magaṁ tryelōkyamallakṣitīśanenippāhavamallanā
tana sutaṁ sōmēśvarōrvvīśvara . tadanujanavinataripunṛpamadagajabiduviduḷanapravīṇakṛpāṇaṁ mudadiṁ rājanvatiyenisidanavaniyaneseva vikramā
dityanṛpa . tatsutanakhiḷakaḷāsaṁpatsannidhi taṁnoḷeseye sarvvajñamahībhṛtsaṁjñevaḍedanamaḷaśaratsamayaśudhāṁśukīrttidhāmaṁ sōma . tatputranu
ddhatārikubhṛtpavidaṁḍāyamānabhujadaṁḍasamudyatpaṭutarapratāpaṁ satpālakanāḷdanurvviyaṁ permmanṛpaṁ . Enisida cāḷukyanṛpāḷanaccinakaṭṭidalaginantesedaṁ kū
rppina balpina tējada māntanadoḷpiṁ vīrapāṁḍyadēvanarēṁdraṁ . gaṁgakaḷiṁgavaṁgamarugūrjjarakēraḷacēracōḷagauḍāṁgavarāṭalāṭakhasabarvvarakōsaḷapuṁḍra
pārasikoṁdaṇakoṁgakoṁkaṇakurupradarāṁdhraturuṣkamāgadhōttuṁganṛpāḷajāḷamanadirppida meygali pāṁḍyabhūbhujaṁ . Ene negaḷdavīra
pāṁḍyāvanipana mātuḷanudāttacittaṁ vidvajjanavinuta vimaḷasucaritananūnaguṇanenipa vikramādityanṛpaṁ . vinayāṁbhōnidhiyeṁdu dharmmataraneṁduddāmapu
ṇyaikabhājananeṁdurvvare baṇnikuṁ vibdhavaktrēṁdīvarādityanaṁ tanuviṁ nityananudghasatyananaśēṣōrvvītaḷastutyanaṁ manusāhityananarkkaṟinde satataṁ śrī
vikramādityanaṁ . śrīkāntāṁbhōjagarbhbhadyumaṇi maṇitirīṭāṁśupu�ṁghripīṭhaṁ śrīkaṇṭhaṁ nākasiṁdhūccaḷadamaḷalasatphēnaśuṁbhaprasūnaṁ lōkēśaṁ
vikramādityarasanabhimatārtthaṁgaḷaṁ māḷke niccaṁ bhūkṛṣṇādhvātmasūryyōdakapavanavidhubyōmagātraṁ triṇētraṁ . śrīvīrapāṁḍyadēvamahīva
llabhajanani vinayavitaraṇaguṇasaṁbhāvitacaritre sōvaladēvige pēḷuḷidanṛpatisatiyaṟdoreyē . rāyanṛpāṁgane bhīllavarāyatanūjāte vikramā
dityanṛpaṁ jyāyaṁ tanagene sōvalegīyugada strīyarāruvēṁ savanoḷarē . Anavaratavittavitaraṇavinōdadiṁ kāmadhēnuviṁde migilsajjanakāmadhēnuve
nisidaḷene sōvaladēvigitarasatiyarssariyē . rāyamahattarabhillavarāyatanūjātanadhikataravimaḷayaśaḥśrīyuvatīśvaranenipana
mēyaguṇaṁ negaḻda vikramādityanṛpaṁ . Ayadoḷvikramadoḷparōpakṛtiyoḷvikhyātiyoḷnītiyoḷdayeyoḷdharmmadoḷārppinoḷvinayadoḷsaṁśuddhiyo
ḷbuddhiyoḷniyataṁ tannavolanyarārene janaṁ jīyaṁbinaṁ santatōdayamaṁ tāḷdida permme nūrmmaḍivalaṁ śrīvikramādityana . janatāsaṁstu
tanādanēkaguṇadiṁ śrīvikramādityadēvanoḷintī kalikālakalmaṣamaṣīsaṁsliṣṭara pālipegginoḷēnunnatasatvasaṁpadadoḷāriṁdaggaḷaṁ
nōrppaḍeṁbinegaṁ tāḷdidanatyudāttacaritaṁ digvarttisatkīrttiyaṁ . sthiratējōjāḷaveṁṭuṁ desege pasarisalvairivīrāndhakāraṁ paredōḍalkānatā
syāṁburuhavanavadānandamaṁ tāḷde vidviṭtaruṇīnētrōtpaḷaṁgaḷkorage nijacamūcakravākōtkaraṁ rāgarasāṁbhōrāśiyoḷnarttise dharegesevaṁ
vikramādityadēvaṁ . sakaḷāśāparipūritasukaraṁ kamaḷādhināthanujvaḷatējādhikaneṁdu drutaprakaṭayaśōdā
ni vikramādityanripa . Ā vibhuvina vadhu bācaladēvi patibrateyaroḷśikhāmaṇiyene saṁbhāvitacaritra negaḷda
ḷiḷāvaḷayaṁ baṇnisalke nijaguṇagaṇama . tillaveḍaṁgaṁ girijāvallabhapadakamaḷabhṛṁganavanita ripubhūvallabhavi
daḷanapaṭuvene sallalitaṁ tattanūbhavaṁ pesarvvaḍeda . paramaṁ śrīvikramādityarasa ninage dīrgghāyuvaṁ śrīyu
maṁ śaṁkaranatyānaṁdadiṁdaṁ kuḍugumamarasaridvāripūtōccaḷachchīkaratārādhāracaṁcattaruṇaśaśikaḷākāntisaṁtānaśōbhākara
majattuṁgapiṁgadyutivikaṭajaṭājūṭakōṭīrabhāra . vinayanidhi vikramādityana sute kalikālasīte lakṣmīvadhu nūtanagauri
yeṁdu pogaḷgu vinute mahādēvirāṇiyaṁ jagamella . Ā mahādēvivadhugaṁ bhū�vośvaranenisidajjanaranāthaṁgaṁ sōma
javibhusamaśauryyōddāmaṁ śrīboppadēvanudayaṁgeyda . śrīvīrapāṁḍyadēvamahīvallabhamahitapādaparamā
rādhya śrīvitararmmadhusūdanadēvarvviracisidareseye śāsanakritiya . svasti śrīmaccāḷukyapratāpacakravartti jagadēkama
llavarṣada 11 neya vibhavasaṁvatsarada puṣya suddha 13 śukravāramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatīpātadaṁdu śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśva
raṁ jagadēkamallavīrapāṁḍyadēvara māvaṁ śrīvikramādityadēvar . śrīmanmahāgrahāraṁ hūvinahaḍaṁgileya Uttaradiśābhāgada
lu śrītuṁgabhadrādēviya dakṣiṇataṭadalu śrīsvayaṁbhukōṭiśaṁkaradēvaraṁgabhōgakke Ā dēvālayada khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhāra
kkaṁ Ā dēvaragrāsanada brāhmaṇabhōjanakkaṁ Ā koṭṭiganūra caturāgāḍāspadamappa bhūmiyellavaṁ tribhōgābhyaṁtarasarvvanamaśyamāgi
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭar . Ā vūralu huṭṭida phalavellavaṁ sakaḷāyasahita tribhāgaṁ māḍidalliya dēvarggoṁdu bhāgavā brāhma
ṇabhōjanakkeraḍubhāgavā tribhāgadoḷagā sthānada paḍuvaṇa śrīsōmanāthadēvara nivēdyakke nityasthitiyorvvaḷakkiyuṁ soḷasige tu
ppamuṁ soḍariṁge soḷasigeyeṇneyumāgi naḍeyisuvaru . Ā kūṭṭiganūra catussīmeyeṁteṁdeḍe . śrītuṁgabhadrādēviyiṁ mūḍa
lu paḍuvamukhavāgi paritaṁda jalapravāha Ā jalapravāhada teṁkalu muttadabāgu Alliṁ mūḍalu basuriya maraṁgaḷu Alliṁ mū
ḍalāladamaraṁgaḷalliṁ mūḍalu kaḍalasarivalliṁ mūḍalu biḷiyakalgaḷalliṁ mūḍalu Aḍiganakeṟeya madhyadalli basuriyama
ra Alliṁ mūḍalu śvētapāṣāṇapaṁti Alliṁ baḍagaṇa here Īśānyadali haṁpanaṟe Adaṟa teṁkayiṇa horeyiṁ paḍuva mogade jalapravāha
paḍuva saṁkanakeṟeya keḷagaṇa huṇise Alliṁ paḍuva mokhade tuṁgabhadrādēviyiṁ muṭṭe kūḍe jalapravāha . Idu catussīmeya prakāra .
Alliya gauṁḍadēvara dēhutanāgi māḍida bhūmiyaṟidu hatakkoṁdu mattarōpādiyiṁ mūnigaramāgi mānyadiṁ māḍikoṁḍuṁbaru sa
mastatējamellamuṁ dēvargge . gōviṁdadēvaṁ Aliya dēvakāryyamumaṁ brāhmaṇakāryyamumaṁ sadviniyōgamāḍi naḍayisuvaru śrīmanma
hāgrahāraṁ hūvinahaḍaṁgileyūroḍeyapramukhamahājanaṁ nūṟirppadiṁbaru Ī dēvakāryyamumaṁ brāhmaṇakāryyamumaṁ tamo(mmo)
ḷagaṇa dharmmaṁgaḷōpādiyiṁ yōgakṣēmamanāraydu sudharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvaru Upēkṣisidaḍā dōṣaṁ nūṟirppadiṁbarigēṟuvudu Intī
dharmmamaṁ pratipālisidavargge vāraṇāsikurukṣētravargghyatīrtthādimahātīrtthaṁgaḷūḷanēka kavilegaḷaṁ kōḍugaḷmaṁ koḷagugaḷmaṁ poṁnuṁ beḷḷiyoḷaṁ
kaṭṭisi kaṁcinakaṟavakaṁdalgaḷuṁ berasu caturvvēdapāragarappanēka brāhmaṇōttamargge nānāratnasuvarṇnāḷaṁkārasahitaṁ dakṣiṇeve
rasu dānaṁ māḍida mahāpuṇyaphalamakku . Intidanaḷida mahāpātakarggā tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷanitu kavilegaḷumanā brāhmaṇōttamaru
maṁ svahastadiṁdaḷida mahāpātakamakku . bahubhiḥ vasudhā bhuktā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya ta
sya tadā phalaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānālināṁ pārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . dānaṁ vā(ṁ) pālanaṁ vēti dānācchrēyōnpālanaṁ dānātvarggamavāpnōti pālanādaśyutaṁ padaṁ . baredaṁ śāsanamaṁ
śankaradēva vīrapāṁḍyadēvanarādhīśvarabhavasaṁdhivigrahidhuraṁdharaṁ vipravaṁśacūḍāratna . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamō
nānuṣṭāṇajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpa(ṁ)nnaruṁ viditavēdārtthavidyāpāragaruṁ śaṭukarmmaniyataruṁ saptasōmasaṁstāvagāhanapavitrīkrita
śarīraruṁ Ēkavākyaruṁ duṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭapratipāḷarumappa śrīmanumahāagrahāraṁ hūvinahaḍaṁgileyūroḍeyapramukhava
śēṣamahājanaṁ nūṟirppadiṁbaruṁ Āṟaneya rudhirōdugārisaṁvatsarada māgha śuddha 5 sōmavāradaṁdu grāmakāryyanimittavāgi śrīsva
yaṁbhukōṭiśaṁkaradēvara sannidhānakke baṁdalli Ā dēvara Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ caitrapavitrakkaṁ Īśvarabhaṭṭana keṟeya dakṣiṇadiśābhāgadalu Ereyakeyi
mattaru Ayidumaṁ śrīmā(ṁ)nyamāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭaru . sivamaiyanāyakanu dēvara nivēdyakke kaṭṭiyiṁdoḷage huṇiseya
gadde kaṁba Eḷunūṟa hadinākumaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭaru . svasti śrīmatu virōdhisaṁvatsarada Āṣāḍha śu 8 sōmavāradaṁdu śrī
matu vikramādityarasaru Ā stānada śrīvīrakēśavadēvara nivēdyakke koṭṭa vritti Eraḍakkaṁ Ereyamattaru nāku keṁgāḍu
mattaru Ayidumaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭaru . svasti śrīmatu viḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa sudda 11 sukra
vāraṁ vyatiyapātadaṁdu śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ vijayapāṁḍyadēvaru hūvinahaḍaṁgilege bijayaṁgeydalli koṭṭiganūra śrīsvayaṁbhukōṭi
śaṁkaradēvaraṁgabhōgakke tamage rājyābhyudayamuṁ matābhyudayārtthamāgiyuṁ tamma māvaṁ vikramādityarasarggavaṁtavara magaṁ tillarasarggamadriṣṭārtthanimi
ttaṁ hūvinahaḍamgileya calliyakēriyallivara māḷigemane sarvvavaṁ dēsukai Ēḷu vūroḍegeṟeya keḷagaṇa tōṁṭaṁ kaṁbaṁ
mūnūṟa Eṁbhbhattumanācaṁdrārkkastāyiyāgi sarvvabādhāparihāramāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭaru [.]
Digital edition of SII 9.254 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
